message:
feat(lab): sync reactor chaos statistics into LabRuntime aggregated stats

LabRuntime::chaos_stats() previously only reflected task-side chaos
injections (cancellations, wakeup storms) but missed reactor-side
injections (IO errors, delays). The fix:

1. LabReactor gains public chaos_stats() and last_io_error_kind()
   accessors (previously tests reached into reactor.inner.lock())

2. LabRuntime tracks seen_reactor_chaos_stats to compute deltas, and
   sync_reactor_chaos_stats() merges new reactor stats into the
   aggregated chaos_stats after each IO driver poll

3. inject_chaos_before_poll() now records no-injection decision points
   via record_no_injection() for accurate decision_points counting

4. Reactor tests updated to use the new public accessors instead of
   reaching through the Mutex

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
